content: Prism as-of policy reference. Reconciliation is always evaluated at an explicit as-of date, and only inputs with a timestamp at or before that date are used, with no hindsight. Each provider assessment carries two dates: the rating action date (asOfDate), when the provider last acted, and the input as-of date (inputAsOfDate), the vintage of the financials the assessment rests on. A provider whose input as-of date precedes the issuer's latest filing date has not yet reflected the newer filing; this observation-date comparison is what surfaces a stale input. This is an observation-date filter, not a point-in-time vintage claim.
disclaimer: Illustrative reference for the reconciliation as-of policy.
